title: cert.rs label_len: panicky try_from for already-bounded value
description: In cert.rs cert_add_trusted, label_len is computed as: u16::try_from(label.len().min(24)).unwrap(). The .min(24) already guarantees the value is <=24, so the try_from cannot fail — but .unwrap() hides that and would panic in impossible circumstances. Compare nvm_add and nvm_overwrite, which use the cleaner 'let label_len = label.len().min(24)' (usize) and cast only at the call site. Rewrite cert_add_trusted to match that pattern: let label_len = label.len().min(24); label_buf[..label_len].copy_from_slice(...); then cast to u16 inline at the FFI call.
